category_sources: source_facts.description says Needle is a compile-time safe Swift dependency injection framework; official GitHub README describes Needle as a Swift DI system.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title is uber/needle and README uses the product name Needle; source_facts.name is needle.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains Getting started, installation, and usage documentation; source_facts.homepage points to the same official repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/uber/needle, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify Swift dependency injection, code generation, compile-time safety, and iOS architecture compatibility; source_facts.executables includes needle.
